Name: Average Longitude
Definition: Average of all latitudes per the filter context
Formula: Sum of Latitudes / Count of Latitudes

Name: Average Longitude
Definition: Average of all longitudes per the filter context
Formula: Sum of Longitudes / Count of Longitudes

Name: Maximum Square Footage Inspected
Definition: The maximum total square footage per the filter context

Name: Maximum Square Footage Inspected_MONTHNAME
Definition: The month name of the maximum total square footage per the filter context
Use Case: Reveal the month in which the maximum total square footage was inspected in a year

Name: Monthly Average Square Footage Inspected
Definition: Average square footage inspected in a year
Formula: SUM([Total Assigned Square Footage]{month 1-i})/total count of months inspected

Name: Square Footage Assigned Comparision by Year
Definition: Numerical difference in square footage assigned by NCDOT between a year and it's previous year
Formula: [Total Assigned Square Footage]{year 2} - [Total Assigned Square Footage]{year 1}
Use Case: Gain insight on the growth or deline in square footage assigned

Name: Square Footage Assigned Comparision by Year_DESCR
Definition: The description of the numerical difference in square footage assigned by NCDOT between a year and it's previous year
Use Case: When a written description is needed to describe the comparision between a year and it's previous year

Name: Square Footage Assigned Comparision by Year_DESCR2
Definition: The sentence conjunction of the numerical difference in square footage assigned by NCDOT between a year and it's previous year
Use Case: Dynamic conjunction to accurate describe data in a sentence

Name: Square Footage Bin Size
Definition: 1500 -- Size for groupings of Square Footage

Name: Structures Assigned Comparision by Year
Definition: Numerical difference in structures assigned by NCDOT between a year and it's previous year
Use Case: Gain insight on the growth or deline in structures assigned

Name: Structures Assigned Comparison by Year_DESCR
Definition: The description of the numerical difference in structures assigned by NCDOT between a year and it's previous year
Use Case: When a written description is needed to describe the comparision between a year and it's previous year

Name: Total Counties Assigned
Definition: Total count of distinct counties assigned by NCDOT

Name: Total Counties Visited to Month
Definition: Total count of distinct counties visited excluding the current month

Name: Total Square Footage Assigned
Definition: Total square footage assigned by NCDOT

Name: Total Square Footage Inspected to Month
Definition: Total square footage inspected excluding the current month

Name: Total Structures Assigned
Definition: Total count of structures assigned by NCDOT

Name: Total Structures Inspected to Month
Definition: Total count of structures inspected excluding the current month

Name: Year In Review
Use Case: When the year is needed as a visual in a report to show filter context
